sql.oracle: UPDATE AD_FCCONFIG SET SUBSCRIPTION_KEY_DISTRIBUTION = '10564b2abb5e475c84d32d2bdabbb857', SUBSCRIPTION_KEY_CONSUMPTION = '2729d311c289417fa6c5ff2d33835cd8', CODTIPOPER = 403, TOP_PEDIDO = 403, CODVEND_PADRAO = 167, DH_ALTERACAO = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE CODCONFIG = (SELECT MAX(CODCONFIG) FROM AD_FCCONFIG)
sql.mssql: UPDATE C SET C.SUBSCRIPTION_KEY_DISTRIBUTION = '10564b2abb5e475c84d32d2bdabbb857', C.SUBSCRIPTION_KEY_CONSUMPTION = '2729d311c289417fa6c5ff2d33835cd8', C.CODTIPOPER = 403, C.TOP_PEDIDO = 403, C.CODVEND_PADRAO = 167, C.DH_ALTERACAO = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM AD_FCCONFIG C WHERE C.CODCONFIG = (SELECT MAX(CODCONFIG) FROM AD_FCCONFIG)
